chest_pain: sudden severe worsening of chest pain
pain spreading to jaw, left arm, or back
chest pain at rest that does not improve
abdominal_pain: severe or sudden worsening of abdominal pain
blood in stool or black tarry stool
inability to keep fluids down for more than 24 hours
dyspnoea: sudden severe shortness of breath at rest
chest pain with shortness of breath
inability to speak in full sentences due to breathlessness
bluish discoloration of lips or fingertips
headache: sudden severe headache unlike any before
headache with fever and stiff neck
headache with vision changes or double vision
headache with weakness or numbness on one side
